title: Create pyproject.toml with package metadata, dependencies (click, rich, pyfiglet), dev dependencies (pytest, mypy, ruff), entry point, and src/greet/__init__.py with version. Run uv sync.

Create Language dataclass in languages.py with name, greeting, code, banner_label fields and LANGUAGES list with 10+ entries. Create Proverb dataclass in fortunes.py with text, source fields and PROVERBS list with ~20 entries. Create OutputConfig and GreetingEntry dataclasses in core.py.
